corrections.text: The article states "On May 19, 2026, SIG-etcd published the first beta of etcd 3.7.0." The Kubernetes blog announcement (https://kubernetes.io/blog/2026/05/20/etcd-370-beta/) is dated Wednesday, May 20, 2026. While the GitHub release tag was created on May 19 at 20:02 UTC, the formal blog announcement — which the article primarily cites — was published on May 20.

The article presents Jeffrey Ying's statement as two separate attributed quotes in distinct paragraphs. In the source (the Kubernetes blog), Ying's words appear as a single continuous quote: "I've always been fascinated by database internals... while maintaining the project's high bar for reliability and code quality." The verbatim text is accurate, but the split framing misrepresents one statement as two.
